meta.title: Mateico — Custom laser-engraved mates from Amsterdam
meta.description: Custom mate with laser engraved designs from Amsterdam. The perfect Argentine gift. Personalized mate on gourd, wood or metal. Shipping across Europe.

hero.title: Your story, engraved by fire
hero.subtitle: Personalized mate with custom laser engraving. Your club, your band, your family — each piece is unique, just like you.
hero.success: You're in! We'll let you know when we launch.
hero.error: Something went wrong, try again in a moment.

showcase.title: The ritual is non-negotiable
showcase.text1: It doesn't matter where in the world you are. If you're Argentine, mate is home. It's the round with friends, the quiet morning, the hug that needs no words.
showcase.text2: At Mateico we engrave what you love most on the mate that's with you every day. Your club, your band, your family, your phrase, so every time you brew, you feel at home.
showcase.highlight: Because every Argentine, wherever they are, deserves to feel like home.

craft.title: Engraved with soul
craft.text1: Each mate goes through our hands and a high-precision laser that engraves your design into gourd, wood or metal.
craft.text2: This isn't mass production. It's one by one, with patience and care. That's why we have a waiting list, it's worth it 😉
craft.text3: From Amsterdam to all of Europe, with our hands on the wood and our hearts in the south.

waitlistCta.title: Want yours?
waitlistCta.subtitle: Leave your email and we'll let you know when your mate is ready. No spam, promise.
waitlistCta.success: You're in! We'll write to you soon.

faq.title: Questions we always get
faq.a1: You pick what you want engraved (your club, your band, a name, a phrase), send us the idea by email and we design the engraving. Once you approve it, we laser-engrave it and ship it to you.
faq.a2: Anything you can think of. Football crests, anime characters, quotes, names, dates, band logos, your own designs... if it can be drawn, it can be engraved.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship all across Europe. We're based in Amsterdam but we deliver wherever you are.
faq.a4: It depends on the complexity of the design, but generally between 1 and 2 weeks from the moment you approve the design.
faq.a5: We work with gourd, wood and metal. Each material has its own charm and the laser finish looks different on each one.
faq.q6: Can I order one as a gift?
faq.a6: Absolutely! It's one of the most popular requests we get. We can engrave it with the person's name, a special date, or whatever you'd like.

footer.tagline: Mates with Argentine soul, handcrafted in Amsterdam.
